extra.reasoning: The input stiff_neck does not appear in any rule condition or action. Rules r1-r5 trigger only on severe_headache, pallor, focal_weakness, sweating, and leg_swelling; the default is routine. Since the set of matching rules, their priorities, and the order-based tie-breaking are all independent of stiff_neck, the computed acuity is identical regardless of stiff_neck's value, for every assignment of the other five inputs. Therefore flipping stiff_neck from false to true (all else unchanged) leaves acuity exactly equal, which satisfies "no lower than before." The monotonicity property holds across the entire input space.
